```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.85em;">three independent checks</div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.65em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.9em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);border-top:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="book-open" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">check 01</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:0.4em;">A published<br>summary stat</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Codebook, prior paper, official table.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.9em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);border-top:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="scale" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">check 02</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:0.4em;">A back-of-envelope<br>calculation</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Done by hand. No model, no AI.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.9em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);border-top:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="users" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">check 03</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:0.4em;">A second analyst<br>(not your session)</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Different chat, different prompt, different model.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.95em;text-align:center;background:rgba(212,95,71,0.08);border:1px dashed rgba(212,95,71,0.4);border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 1em;font-size:0.6em;color:#7A2418;line-height:1.5;">
  Disagreement &nbsp;→&nbsp; the <strong>AI-assisted pipeline is wrong</strong> until you can explain the gap.
 </div>

</div>
```
